title: AutoCog artifact metadata
description: Universal metadata block carried by every generated AutoCog artifact (IR, STA, FTA). STL source files have no metadata.

format.description: Discriminator; identifies which schema governs this artifact.

version.description: AutoCog project version that produced this artifact.

uid.description: Truncated SHA-256 of this artifact's JCS-canonicalized content (with this field absent during hashing).

source_uid.description: uid of the artifact (or hash of the source file) from which this was derived.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of artifact creation.
